character.name: rin_chef
character.prompt: A chibi girl chef with vivid red twin ponytails. She wears a bright red chef jacket (color #ff4444) and dark brown apron. No chef hat — instead wears a red headband. Strong and fiery expression. Holds cooking tongs in right hand. Energetic flame chef appearance. Low top-down view, 8 directions, chibi proportions.
